personal.name: Berton Quon
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.bio: Full-stack developer focused on creating clean, performant solutions. Passionate about modern web technologies and solving complex problems.

projects.title: Mahjong Game
projects.description: Web based Mahjong game built with JavaScript and React. It features a responsive design, smooth animations, and an intuitive user interface.

projects.title: EventFull
projects.description: Capstone project: a full stack project built with Java Spring Boot and React. It allows users to create and manage events, with features like user authentication, event creation, mobile ticket check in, and real-time updates.

experience.description: Led development of key features and mentored junior developers.
